negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. name: common_sense_8d4e314b-498a-405d-a63f-3493e44007c7
prompt: In this video, a bearded man wearing a light gray long-sleeved zip-up hoodie is seen in a compact, well-organized kitchen cutting a piece of fruit with a knife. The man, positioned in an eye-level medium shot, holds a silver knife with a white handle in his right hand and half of a sliced fruit in his left hand. The kitchen features a small gimbaled silver stovetop with two burners, above which there's a microwave set within a built-in cabinet. The stovetop, which rocks slightly throughout the video, has a skillet over the right burner. The scene starts with the man turning to his right and then back towards the camera, with the camera making small random motions. As the camera moves, the man begins to talk, facing the camera, and proceeds to slice the fruit. He then places the knife on the countertop towards his right and offers the sliced fruit to the person behind the camera. The person, wearing a full-sleeved black top, extends their left hand to take the slice of the fruit. The kitchen is well-lit with natural light coming from two small windows adjacent to the area. Part of a metal handle can be seen in front of the person by the window to the left. In the background, a hanging basket with various colored fruits is visible on the countertop. A step-up stool is partly visible next to the black and white countertop towards the right side, and some small potted plants are also present on the countertop below the window on the right side. The overall setting suggests a cozy, functional kitchen space, likely aboard a boat given the compact design and the presence of a skylight.
